category_sources: Official SourceForge project page describes cscope as an efficient text-only browser for C sources.
source_facts.description identifies cscope as a tool for browsing source code.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official SourceForge homepage use the cscope name.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge site hosts the cscope manual page and project homepage.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge Code/Git page is the project source-control browser.
source_facts.homepage is the same official SourceForge project site.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe source browsing, symbol lookup, and C/C++ code navigation.
